comment: 47yo male, asymptomatic, confirmed germline BRCA2 pathogenic variant (c.5946delT founder allele) on cascade panel after sister's BRCA2-positive ovarian cancer at 51. No personal cancer diagnosis. Engine fires RF-BRCA-CONFIRMED-CARRIER → routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-BRCA-CARRIER-SURVEILLANCE (male breast CBE q6-12mo from 35, baseline mammography 50 and consider repeat per density, PSA + DRE annually from 40, pancreatic surveillance discussion if ≥2 affected first-degree relatives); aggressive = IND-BRCA-CARRIER-INTENSIFIED (annual mpMRI prostate from 40, EUS / MRCP pancreatic surveillance from 50). Validates v0.2-B BRCA2 male-carrier pathway.
